steps.name: Detect tau
steps.description: Detect conflict, error, external perturbation, or closure precursor.

steps.name: Freeze execution softly
steps.description: Maintain execution but introduce damping: keep A revisable while reducing update velocity.

steps.name: Isolate A from I
steps.description: Mark and separate intuition I from authority A to avoid identity collapse.

steps.name: Estimate revision cost
steps.description: Compare revision cost versus continuation cost under current A.

steps.name: Apply minimal edit
steps.description: Perform the smallest edit to A that resolves tau and avoids over-correction.

steps.name: Retain rollback handle
steps.description: Keep at least k alternative routes accessible: rho != empty.

steps.name: Log + re-entry
steps.description: Record the edit and re-inject it into the next transition so authority becomes a revisable trace.
